mapper.insert: INSERT INTO User ( id, username, email, avatar, user_agent, refresh_token, access_token ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{userAgent}, #{refreshToken}, #{accessToken} ) ON CONFLICT(email) DO UPDATE SET id = excluded.id, username = excluded.username, avatar = excluded.avatar, user_agent = excluded.user_agent, refresh_token = excluded.refresh_token, access_token = excluded.access_token
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM User WHERE id IS NOT NULL AND email IS NOT NULL AND refresh_token IS NOT NULL AND refresh_token != '' LIMIT 1
